query_intent: Find customers whose year-over-year change in web-payment variability (stddev of net paid) from 1999 to 2000 exceeds the corresponding change in store-payment variability.

dag_nodes.intent: Compute per-customer yearly standard deviation of net paid for store and web channels in 1999 and 2000.
Self-join customer/channel/year variability rows, require positive 1999 variability baselines, compare web versus store year-over-year ratios, and return matching customer names.
